metadata.website_type: dog breeding and show kennel website

tasks.name: Reserve the cheapest male show prospect puppy under $2,500 available in May 2025
tasks.description: Find male show prospect puppies available in May 2025 with a price of $2,500 or less, sired by a champion, and reserve the cheapest one by completing the on-site reservation form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main menu option labeled "Available Puppies".
In the filters sidebar, click on the "Sex" filter and select the "Male" checkbox.
Find the "Price" filter, enter "2500" in the maximum price field, and apply the filter.
Locate the "Availability Date" filter, open the date picker, and set the month to "May 2025" with any day in that month selected.
In the "Puppy Type" or "Placement" filter, select the "Show Prospect" option.
In the "Sire Titles" filter, select the option that includes "Champion (CH)" or higher titles.
Open the sorting dropdown above the results and select "Price: Low to High".
Click on the first puppy card in the filtered and sorted results list (the cheapest male show prospect meeting the criteria).

On the puppy detail page, click the "Reserve Puppy" button and on the reservation form select the "Hold for 7 days" option, then click the "Submit Reservation" button to complete the reservation request.

tasks.name: Book the earliest Saturday afternoon kennel tour for a group of 3 visitors
tasks.description: Schedule a kennel tour for exactly 3 visitors on a Saturday afternoon between 1:00 PM and 4:00 PM, choosing the earliest available time slot within that window and submitting the on-site booking form.
steps: From any page, click on the main navigation link labeled "Visits & Tours" or "Kennel Tours".
On the tours page, click the button or link labeled "Book a Tour" or "Schedule a Visit".
In the tour type dropdown, select the option labeled "Standard Kennel Tour".
In the group size or number of visitors field, enter the number "3".
Open the date picker and navigate to the next available Saturday, then select that Saturday date.
In the time of day filter or dropdown, choose the option labeled "Afternoon (1 PM - 4 PM)" or manually scroll the time options to view only times between 1:00 PM and 4:00 PM.
From the list of available time slots between 1:00 PM and 4:00 PM on that Saturday, click on the earliest time shown.
In the contact name field, enter a full name such as "Alex Carter".
In the email field, type "alex.carter@example.com" and in the phone field type "555-123-4567".
Click the "Confirm Booking" or "Submit Request" button to finalize the kennel tour booking.

tasks.name: Choose the best-value stud dog under $1,500 with top health clearances and most titles
tasks.description: Compare stud dogs with a stud fee of $1,500 or less that have hip score A and are DNA clear, then select the one with the highest number of show titles and start a breeding inquiry using the on-site form.
steps: Navigate to the homepage and click on the main menu link labeled "Stud Dogs" or "Our Males".
On the stud dogs listing page, locate the "Stud Fee" filter and set the maximum fee to "1500".
Find the "Health Testing" filters and select the options for "Hip Score A" and "DNA Clear".
Apply the filters and then click the "Compare" toggle or checkbox for the first three stud dogs shown in the filtered results list.
Click the "Compare Selected" or similar button to open the comparison view for those three stud dogs.
In the comparison table, identify the stud dog that lists the highest total number of show titles (for example, count of CH, GCH, BIS, etc.) and note his name.
In the comparison view or by returning to the listing, click on the name or image of that stud dog with the most titles to open his detail page.
On the stud dog detail page, click the "Breeding Inquiry" or "Request Stud Service" button.
In the inquiry form, enter a kennel name such as "Riverside Kennels" and a contact email such as "contact@riversidekennels.com".
In the message field, type a short message mentioning you want to plan a breeding with this stud within the next 6 months, then click the "Send Inquiry" button.

tasks.name: Register for the cheapest handling workshop within 100 miles in the next 3 months
tasks.description: Find conformation handling workshops scheduled in the next 3 months within 100 miles of ZIP code 90001, sort them by price, and register for the cheapest one using the on-site event registration and checkout flow without using any external login.
steps: From the main navigation, click on the "Events" or "Workshops & Classes" section.
On the events page, use the event type filter to select "Handling Workshop" or similar.
Locate the date range filter, set the start date to today and the end date to 3 months from today, and apply the date range.
Find the location or distance filter, enter the ZIP code "90001" and set the distance limit to "100 miles".
Apply the filters and then use the sort dropdown to select "Price: Low to High" for the filtered workshops.
Click on the first workshop in the sorted list (the cheapest handling workshop that meets the criteria) to open its detail page.
On the workshop detail page, click the "Register" or "Sign Up" button.
In the registration form, select "1" as the number of participants and type a participant name such as "Jordan Lee".
Enter an email such as "jordan.lee@example.com" and choose a payment method option labeled "Pay at Check-In" or "Pay Later" (if available) to avoid using external payment services.
Click the "Complete Registration" or "Submit Registration" button to finalize the workshop registration.

tasks.name: Buy one medium logo t‑shirt under $30 and one 4.5+ star leash with free shipping
tasks.description: Use the kennel store to purchase exactly two items: one medium-sized kennel logo t‑shirt priced under $30, and one dog leash with a rating of at least 4.5 stars and free shipping, then proceed to the checkout page with quantity 1 of each item.
steps: From the homepage, click on the "Shop" or "Store" link in the main navigation.
On the store page, select the "Apparel" or "Clothing" category.
In the apparel listing, use the search or filter to locate products with "logo t-shirt" in the name or description.
Use the price filter to set the maximum price to "$30" and apply the filter to the t‑shirt results.
Click on a "Kennel Logo T-Shirt" product that appears in the filtered list, then on its product page choose the size "Medium" and set the quantity field to "1".
Click the "Add to Cart" button to add the medium logo t‑shirt to the cart.
Navigate back to the store main categories and select the "Leashes" or "Collars & Leashes" category.
In the leashes section, set the rating filter to show only products with a rating of "4.5 stars" or higher and enable the shipping filter option labeled "Free Shipping".
From the filtered leashes, click on the first product in the list, then on the product page leave the quantity as "1" and click "Add to Cart".
After adding the leash, click on the cart icon in the header and then click the "Proceed to Checkout" button to go to the checkout page with both items in the cart.

tasks.name: Join the waitlist for a planned litter with fully health-tested parents and preferred color
tasks.description: Find a planned litter where both parents have full health testing and the expected puppy color includes "black and tan", then join the waitlist requesting one female pet puppy under $2,000 using the waitlist form.
steps: From the main menu, click on the "Planned Litters" or "Upcoming Litters" section.
On the planned litters page, use the health testing filter to select an option such as "Both parents fully health tested" or select all relevant health clearances for both sire and dam.
In the color or "Expected Colors" filter, select or type the color option that includes "black and tan".
Apply the filters and then click on the first planned litter in the results that matches the criteria to open its detail page.
On the litter detail page, click the button labeled "Join Waitlist" or "Reserve a Puppy".
In the waitlist form, select "Female" as the preferred sex and choose "Pet/Companion" as the placement type.
Find the budget or price range field and enter a maximum budget of "2000" dollars.
In the name field, type "Morgan Davis" and in the email field enter "morgan.davis@example.com".
In the notes or preferences field, type a short message indicating you prefer a black and tan female pet puppy from this litter.
Click the "Submit Waitlist Request" button to complete joining the waitlist.

tasks.name: Ask a detailed availability question about a specific puppy via the contact form
tasks.description: Locate a specific available puppy by ID from the listings, then submit a question about that puppy’s availability through the main contact form, including the puppy’s ID and desired pickup date.
steps: Navigate to the "Available Puppies" page from the main navigation.
Scroll through the puppy listings and click on the first puppy whose name appears in the list to open its detail page.
On the puppy detail page, locate the puppy’s ID or reference number and note it (for example, "PUP-103").
Use the site’s main navigation or footer to click on the "Contact" or "Contact Us" link.
On the contact page, choose the subject dropdown option labeled "Puppy Availability" or similar.
In the name field, enter "Taylor Johnson" and in the email field type "taylor.johnson@example.com".
In the message text area, type a message that includes the noted puppy ID and asks if that puppy will still be available for pickup on a specific date, such as "June 15, 2025".
In the phone number field, enter "555-987-6543".
If there is a preferred contact method option, select "Email".
Click the "Send Message" or "Submit" button to send the availability question.

tasks.name: Track two 2025 dog shows within 300 miles where kennel dogs are entered
tasks.description: Find 2025 dog shows within 300 miles of ZIP code 60601 where the kennel has dogs entered, then add the first two qualifying shows to your on-site watchlist or tracking list.
steps: From the homepage, click on the "Show Schedule" or "Upcoming Shows" link in the navigation.
On the show schedule page, set the year filter to "2025".
Locate the location or distance filter, enter the ZIP code "60601" and set the distance to a maximum of "300 miles".
Apply the filters, then use the participation filter to select "Shows where our dogs are entered" or a similar option.
From the resulting list, click on the first show in the list that meets the criteria to open its detail page.
On that show’s detail page, click the button labeled "Add to Watchlist" or "Track This Show".
Return to the filtered show list using the back navigation or "Back to Shows" link.
Click on the second show in the list that meets the criteria to open its detail page.
On the second show’s detail page, again click the "Add to Watchlist" or "Track This Show" button.
Finally, click on the "My Watchlist" or "Tracked Shows" link in the account or header area to navigate to the page summarizing the shows you are tracking.

entities.name: Puppy
entities.description: Individual available puppy records used for listings, detail pages, filters, and reservations.

fields.description: References StudDog when sire is one of the kennel studs

entities.name: TourSlot
entities.description: Bookable time slots for kennel tours, used to find the earliest available Saturday afternoon slot.

entities.name: OrderItem

entities.name: ContactMessage
